summary: Comprehensive backend testing of ATOM AI subscription, usage tracking, and admin endpoints. All 24 tests passed (100%).

minor.issue: Super admin's subscription plan shows 'free' instead of 'enterprise' because the user was created before subscription feature was added. This is cosmetic only - super admin has unlimited access regardless via is_super_admin flag.

passed_tests: GET /api/subscription/plans - Returns 3 plans (Free, Pro, Enterprise)
Free plan structure - Correct pricing ($0), 10 credits, limited agents/modes
Pro plan structure - Correct pricing ($29), 500 credits, all agents/modes, ultra_thinking
Enterprise plan structure - Correct pricing ($99), unlimited (-1) features
GET /api/subscription - Returns user subscription with plan details
GET /api/subscription - Super admin correctly identified (is_super_admin: true)
GET /api/user/usage - Returns usage stats (chat_messages, code_executions, etc.)
GET /api/user/usage - Returns limits based on plan
GET /api/user/usage - Returns billing period dates
GET /api/user/usage - Super admin shows is_unlimited: true
GET /api/user/preferences - Returns user preferences (default_agent, mode, theme)
PUT /api/user/preferences - Successfully updates preferences
PUT /api/user/preferences - Persistence verified via GET after update
GET /api/admin/stats - Returns platform statistics for super admin
GET /api/admin/stats - Returns 403 for non-admin users
GET /api/admin/users - Returns all users for super admin (password excluded)
GET /api/admin/users - Returns 403 for non-admin users
GET /api/admin/users - Pagination works correctly (skip/limit)
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/credits - Successfully adds credits to user
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/credits - Returns 403 for non-admin users
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/credits - Returns 404 for non-existent user
POST /api/code/execute - Deducts credits (0.05) from regular user
GET /api/user/usage/history - Returns usage log entries
GET /api/user/usage/history - Action filter works correctly
GET /api/admin/usage - Returns platform-wide usage stats for admin
GET /api/admin/usage - Returns 403 for non-admin users
seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts from previous iteration. Admin credit addition test added 50 credits to regular user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All subscription, usage tracking, and admin endpoints are working correctly. Super admin has unlimited access via is_super_admin flag. Usage logging tracks all actions including code executions and admin credit additions with timestamps and metadata. Admin endpoints correctly return 403 for non-admin users.

credits_deduction.evidence: Usage counters increment correctly after code execution
